generatedAt: <ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>

schemaConstraints.verifiedAt: <ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>

controlPlane.verifiedAt: <ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>

artifactLineage.attemptId: <safe attempt ID generated for this audit>
artifactLineage.dbEnvironmentIdentity: <explicit DB/environment identity reviewed for this audit>
artifactLineage.vtexProbeHash: <sha256 of the approved non-live/approved probe input used for this audit>
artifactLineage.vtexProbeTimestamp: <ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>

rollbackDrill.pitrBackupPosture: Supabase PITR/backup posture reviewed for env=<explicit DB/environment identity>; retention=<retention window>; artifact=<regenerated preimage artifact path>; timestamp=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>. Rollback artifacts must be regenerated by the rollback verification tooling so each artifact internal generatedAt is a fresh ISO timestamp.
rollbackDrill.cacheHandling: No cache purge unless explicitly approved; public cache TTL/invalidation posture reviewed; post-rollback cache verification artifact=<regenerated post-rollback verification artifact path>; timestamp=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>. Rollback artifacts must be regenerated by the rollback verification tooling so each artifact internal generatedAt is a fresh ISO timestamp.

vtexBudgets.verifiedAt: <ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
vtexBudgets.backoffPolicy: Stop source on timeout/403/429/HTML/captcha/hash_invalid; no automatic retry.
vtexBudgets.stopRule: Source becomes STOPPED before denominator/pilot if blocked, rate-limit, or hash_invalid; no automatic retry.
vtexBudgets.headerPolicy: Use documented non-evasive request headers only; no anti-bot bypass behavior.

compliance.reviewedAt: <ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
reviewedSources: <artifactLineage.source reviewed for allowed use before audit>

alertChannel.policyVerifiedAt: <ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
alertChannel.channel: Issue #<issue> evidence comment plus concrete direct-refresh alert destination <channel/url>
alertChannel.suppressionPolicy: No suppression for rollback-required alerts; document any non-critical suppression here.
alertChannel.retryPolicy: No automatic retry after rollback-required; operator must review and approve any retry.
alertChannel.testAlertProof: test-alert proof captured in issue #<issue> evidence comment timestamp=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>

performanceGuard.prismaPoolPosture: pgbouncer=<true/false>; connection_limit=<positive integer>; pool_timeout=<positive seconds>; verifiedAt=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
performanceGuard.transactionTimeoutPosture: statement_timeout=<bounded timeout>; idle_in_transaction_session_timeout=<bounded timeout>; verifiedAt=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
performanceGuard.priceHistoryBaseline: PriceHistory insert/read baseline captured; insert_p95=<ms>; read_p95=<ms>; measuredAt=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
performanceGuard.publicApiBaseline: public API search/products baseline captured; p95=<ms>; measuredAt=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
performanceGuard.cacheTtlBaseline: cache TTL baseline captured; ttl=<seconds>; measuredAt=<ISO timestamp captured within 15 minutes of audit>
